de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.match.vm.instructions

    • Constructor Detail

      • MatchSortDependingFunctionInstruction

    • Method Detail

      • matchSorts

        private MatchConditions matchSorts(Sort dependingSortToMatch,
                         MatchConditions matchConditions,
                         Services services)
        matches the depending sort of this instructions sort depending function against the given sort. If a match is possible the resulting match conditions are returned otherwise null is returned.
        Parameters:
        dependingSortToMatch - the depending Sort of the concrete function to be matched
        matchConditions - the MatchConditions accumulated so far
        Returns:
        null if failed the resulting match conditions otherwise the resulting MatchConditions

      • match

        public final MatchConditions match(Term instantiationCandidate,
                    MatchConditions matchConditions,
                    Services services)
        Tries to match the top level operator of the given term with this instruction's sort depending function symbol. It returns the resulting match conditions or null if no match is possible because the top level operator is not a sort depending function or the resulting constraints on the sorts are unsatisfiable.
        Specified by:
        match in class Instruction<SortDependingFunction>
        Parameters:
        instantiationCandidate - the Term to be matched
        matchConditions - the MatchConditions specifying the constraints to be considered
        services - the Services
        Returns:
        null if no matches have been found or the new MatchConditions with the pair (sv, instantiationCandidate) added

      • match

        public MatchConditions match(TermNavigator termPosition,
                    MatchConditions mc,
                    Services services)
